# This test verifies that MMA repair replaces dead voters. All 10 ranges start
# with 3 voters on s1-s3. Node 3 dies, making ranges under-replicated. MMA
# should add a replacement voter on a healthy node and remove the dead voter.
#
# Expected outcome: all ranges back to RF=3, no under-replicated ranges.

gen_cluster nodes=6 region=(a,b,c) nodes_per_region=(2,2,2)
----

# Place all ranges on s1-s3 so every range is affected when s3 dies.
gen_ranges ranges=10 repl_factor=3 placement_type=replica_placement
{s1:*,s2,s3}:1
----
{s1:*,s2,s3}:1

set_span_config
[0,9999999999): num_replicas=3 num_voters=3
----

setting split_queue_enabled=false
----

set_status node=3 liveness=dead
----

assertion type=conformance under=0
----

eval duration=10m seed=42 cfgs=(mma-repair) metrics=(replicas,leases)
----
mma-repair:
leases#1: first: [s1=10, s2=0, s3=0, s4=0, s5=0, s6=0] (stddev=3.73, mean=1.67, sum=10)
leases#1: last:  [s1=10, s2=0, s3=0, s4=0, s5=0, s6=0] (stddev=3.73, mean=1.67, sum=10)
leases#1: thrash_pct: [s1=0%, s2=0%, s3=0%, s4=0%, s5=0%, s6=0%]  (sum=0%)
replicas#1: first: [s1=10, s2=10, s3=10, s4=0, s5=0, s6=0] (stddev=5.00, mean=5.00, sum=30)
replicas#1: last:  [s1=10, s2=10, s3=0, s4=0, s5=7, s6=3] (stddev=4.24, mean=5.00, sum=30)
replicas#1: thrash_pct: [s1=0%, s2=0%, s3=0%, s4=0%, s5=0%, s6=0%]  (sum=0%)
hash: 704fa78b9508d6ab
==========================
